docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KUAHIWI KAHAPEA (VICE PRESIDENT OF OPPERATIONS) FILED BY DEFENDANT PARKMERCED OWNER LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-08-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. PLAINTIFF VENOO KAKAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PARKMERCED OWNER LLC IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS KUAHIWI KAHAPEA. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAKAR, VENOO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARKMERCED OWNER LLC $690.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $720.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,180.00 FILED BY KAKAR, VENOO AS TO DEFENDANT PARKMERCED OWNER LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-31-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT PARKMERCED OWNER LLC
